title: Feature Request: Simplifying Project Access with Right-Click on Portfolio Board

posts.author: chrisjterrell (Chris Terrell)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, accessing my project requires a two-click process, which feels a bit cumbersome.

I noticed that right-clicking offers an ‘Open Project’ option, but I think it would be much more efficient to have a ‘Go To Project’ option directly available. This would allow me to access my project with just one right-click.

What are you trying to achieve

I want to get to my Project Board from the Portfolio boards in less clicks

posts.author: chrisjterrell (Chris Terrell)
posts.cookedHtml:
Basically I want this

image346×500 15.4 KB

posts.author: chrisjterrell (Chris Terrell)
posts.cookedHtml: Or even a way to add tasks to my project that would be nice as well
